respectRobotsTxt.description: When true, hosts that disallow scraping via robots.txt are skipped (returned with status 0 + error: 'robots_disallowed').

maxBodyBytes.description: Per-URL body size cap. Bodies exceeding are truncated; flagged with truncated:true in output.

extractReadable.description: When true, host runs HTML readability extraction (Mozilla Readability or similar) and returns `extractedText`. When false, returns raw body.
